items.title: TechCrunch Mobility: Robotaxi reality check

_source_config.name: TechCrunch
_source_config.reason: 创投科技媒体，需筛选AI创业、产品相关

items.ai_target_audience: Tech industry professionals, mobility investors, and innovation enthusiasts tracking autonomous vehicle development and market reality.
items.ai_key_insights: The article provides a grounded assessment of the robotaxi sector, contrasting ambitious promises with operational hurdles, regulatory landscapes, and current deployment limitations. It highlights recent industry pivots, safety concerns, and the gap between public perception and technological maturity, offering a timely reality check for stakeholders.
items.ai_recommendation: 本文剖析自动驾驶出租车从概念到落地的现实鸿沟，为设计师揭示了乘客交互、信任构建与应急体验中亟待解决的关键痛点。
items.title_bilingual: TechCrunch Mobility：Robotaxi 现实检验 / TechCrunch Mobility: Robotaxi reality check

items.title: Hackers are learning to exploit chatbot ‘personalities’

_source_config.name: The Verge
_source_config.reason: 主流科技媒体，内容广泛，需AI筛选AI+设计相关

items.ai_target_audience: UX designers working on conversational interfaces, chatbot developers, AI product managers
items.ai_key_insights: Chatbot personalities, while enhancing user engagement, can be exploited by hackers to manipulate responses and gain unauthorized access, underscoring the need for secure design principles in conversational AI.
items.ai_recommendation: 该文章揭示了聊天机器人人格设计中的安全隐患，对构建既亲切又安全的对话界面的设计师具有警示和启发意义。
items.title_original: Hackers are learning to exploit chatbot ‘personalities’
items.title_en: Hackers are learning to exploit chatbot ‘personalities’
items.title_zh: 黑客正在学习利用聊天机器人的“个性”
items.title_bilingual: 黑客正在学习利用聊天机器人的“个性” / Hackers are learning to exploit chatbot ‘personalities’

items.title: Why Garlic Repels Mosquitoes and Keeps Them From Breeding

_source_config.name: Wired
_source_config.reason: 科技文化媒体，需筛选AI+设计深度报道

items.ai_target_audience: 关心健康生活、自然防蚊方法的普通大众，可能包括园艺爱好者或对家用小窍门感兴趣的读者。
items.ai_key_insights: 文章解释了大蒜中含有的蒜素等硫化合物能通过气味驱避蚊子，并抑制其幼虫繁殖，提供了基于化学原理的防蚊思路和实际应用建议。
items.ai_recommendation: 本文从科学角度解读蒜头的驱蚊机制，实用性高，但内容与UI/UX设计无直接关联，更适合生活方式类读者参考。
items.title_original: Why Garlic Repels Mosquitoes and Keeps Them From Breeding
items.title_en: Why Garlic Repels Mosquitoes and Keeps Them From Breeding
items.title_zh: 为什么大蒜可以驱除蚊子并防止它们繁殖
items.title_bilingual: 为什么大蒜可以驱除蚊子并防止它们繁殖 / Why Garlic Repels Mosquitoes and Keeps Them From Breeding
